


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

setwd("/Users/guillaumeurtecho/Dropbox/UrtechoLab/Projects/2024/FMT_Metabolic_models_ZZ/Github_Workshop/Figure3AB/scripts")
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(cowplot)
library(ggsignif)
library(ranger)

#taxonomy data
tax <- read.csv("../ref/taxonomy_counts.csv")

#Mahalonibis distance for donor-recipient
dist <- read.csv("../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/nearest_neighbors_t0.csv") %>% 
  separate(comparison, into = c('donor', 'recipient'), sep = ' vs ', remove = F )

#growth rate
growth <- read.csv("../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/growth_rates_t0.csv") #%>% rename(donor=sample_id)


#donor/recipient diversity ratios
div <- read.csv("../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/shannonDiversity.csv") %>% na.omit()

#metabolc independence
independence <- read.table('../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/genome_scores.tsv', sep = '\t', header =T) %>% 
  rename(taxon=genome_name, met_independence = genome_score) %>% left_join(., read.table("../ref/filtered_strain_taxa.tsv", sep = '\t', header = T), by = c('taxon'='MicrobeID')) %>% select(-taxon, -Strain) %>% rename('taxon'='NCBI.Taxonomy.ID')

#assembled metabolic data together
data <- dist %>% 
  left_join(., div, by = c('donor', 'recipient')) %>% #diversity and ratios for donor and recipient
  left_join(., independence, by = 'taxon') %>% #independence of taxa
  select(-sample_id) 

#Read in abundance files
abundance_dat <- read.csv("../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/pre_post_abundances.csv")
donor_abd <- read.csv("../processed_data/ZZ_modelInput/donor_abundances.csv") 


AllMetabolicFeatures <- data %>% left_join(., abundance_dat, by = c('donor', 'recipient', 'taxon')) %>% left_join(., donor_abd, by = c('donor', 'taxon'))
   

```



Figure 3A
```{r}
library(ranger)
library(cowplot)
library(ggsignif)

# ── Read palette (at top of script, after loading libraries) ─────────────
human_palette <- read.csv("../../utils/human_order_palette.csv")
order_colors <- setNames(human_palette$color, human_palette$order)
named_orders <- setdiff(names(order_colors), "Other")



# ── Shared feature set (used in every model below) ───────────────────────
rf_features <- c("average_distance", #"degree_centrality", "growth_rate",
                 "diversity_ratio", "met_independence", "log10_pre_abund")

rf_formula <- as.formula(paste("log_fold_change ~", paste(rf_features, collapse = " + ")))

# ── 1) Prepare RF training table ─────────────────────────────────────────
df_rf <- AllMetabolicFeatures %>%
  mutate(log10_pre_abund = log10(pre_abundance)) %>%
  filter(is.finite(log_fold_change), is.finite(log10_pre_abund))

# ── 2) Full model (OOB stats only, not used for figures) ─────────────────
set.seed(123)
rf_mod <- ranger(
  formula       = rf_formula,
  data          = df_rf,
  num.trees     = 100,
  mtry          = 3,
  min.node.size = 2,
  importance    = "permutation"
)

cat("RF OOB R-squared:", rf_mod$r.squared, "\n")
cat("RF OOB MSE:", rf_mod$prediction.error, "\n")

# ── 3) Leave-one-recipient-out cross-validation ──────────────────────────
#    Tracks: abundance-level rho, fold-change rho, permutation importance
recipients <- unique(df_rf$recipient)
n_rec      <- length(recipients)

df_rf$loo_pred_fc <- NA_real_

loo_rho_abundance <- numeric(n_rec)
loo_rho_fc        <- numeric(n_rec)
imp_matrix        <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_rec, ncol = length(rf_features),
                            dimnames = list(recipients, rf_features))

for (i in seq_along(recipients)) {
  rec      <- recipients[i]
  train_df <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient != rec)
  test_df  <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient == rec)
  
  mod <- ranger(
    formula       = rf_formula,
    data          = train_df,
    num.trees     = 100,
    mtry          = 3,
    min.node.size = 2,
    importance    = "permutation"
  )
  
  preds <- predict(mod, data = test_df)$predictions
  df_rf$loo_pred_fc[df_rf$recipient == rec] <- preds
  
  # Predicted post-FMT abundance
  pred_abundance <- test_df$pre_abundance * 2^preds
  
  # Abundance-level rho (compositional concordance)
  loo_rho_abundance[i] <- cor(test_df$post_abundance, pred_abundance,
                              method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  
  # Fold-change-level rho (more conservative)
  loo_rho_fc[i] <- cor(test_df$log_fold_change, preds, method = "spearman")
  
  # Permutation importance from this fold
  imp_matrix[i, ] <- mod$variable.importance
}

# Compute predicted abundance for all samples
df_rf$loo_pred_abundance <- df_rf$pre_abundance * 2^df_rf$loo_pred_fc

# ── Report LOO statistics ────────────────────────────────────────────────
rho_overall_abd <- cor(df_rf$post_abundance, df_rf$loo_pred_abundance,
                       method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
rho_overall_fc  <- cor(df_rf$log_fold_change, df_rf$loo_pred_fc,
                       method = "spearman")

cat("LOO rho (abundance):", round(median(loo_rho_abundance), 2),
    "+-", round(sd(loo_rho_abundance), 2), "\n")
cat("Overall stitched LOO rho (abundance):", round(rho_overall_abd, 3), "\n")
cat("LOO rho (fold-change):", round(median(loo_rho_fc), 2),
    "+-", round(sd(loo_rho_fc), 2), "\n")
cat("Overall stitched LOO rho (fold-change):", round(rho_overall_fc, 3), "\n")

# ── 4) Figure 3A: observed vs LOO-predicted abundance ────────────────────


df_plot <- df_rf %>%
  left_join(select(tax, -sample_id, -abundance) %>% distinct(), by = c("taxon" = "id")) %>%
  mutate(order_plot = if_else(order %in% named_orders, order, "Other"),
         order_plot = factor(order_plot, levels = c(named_orders, "Other")))

fig3a <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = log10(post_abundance + 1e-6),
                             y = log10(loo_pred_abundance + 1e-6))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = order_plot), alpha = 0.5) +
 # geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = order_colors, name = "Order") +
  annotate("text",
           x = min(log10(df_rf$post_abundance + 1e-6), na.rm = TRUE) + 1,
           y = max(log10(df_rf$loo_pred_abundance + 1e-6), na.rm = TRUE) - 0.5,
           label = paste0("rho == ", round(median(loo_rho_abundance), 2),
                          "*','~~ p < 2.2e-16"),
           parse = TRUE, hjust = 0, size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    x = expression(Observed~log[10](Post-FMT~Abundance)),
    y = expression(Predicted~log[10](Post-FMT~Abundance)),
    color = "Order"
  ) +
  theme_cowplot()

print(fig3a)

ggsave("../figs/Fig3A_LOO_predicted_vs_observed.pdf", fig3a, width = 5, height = 3)
ggsave("../figs/Fig3A_LOO_predicted_vs_observed.png", fig3a, width = 5, height = 3, bg = "white")

```




Prediction accuracy by responder vs non-responder:

```{r}
rho_df <- tibble(
  recipient         = recipients,
  rho               = loo_rho_abundance,
  clinical_response = map_chr(recipients, ~ unique(df_rf$clinical_response[df_rf$recipient == .x]))
)

cat("Responder LOO rho:", round(median(rho_df$rho[rho_df$clinical_response == "responder"]), 2), "+-",
    round(sd(rho_df$rho[rho_df$clinical_response == "responder"]), 2), "\n")
cat("Non-responder LOO rho:", round(median(rho_df$rho[rho_df$clinical_response == "non-responder"]), 2), "+-",
    round(sd(rho_df$rho[rho_df$clinical_response == "non-responder"]), 2), "\n")

fig3b <-  ggplot(rho_df, aes(x = clinical_response, y = rho, fill = clinical_response)) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0, width = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons      = list(c("responder", "non-responder")),
    test             = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    textsize         = 4,
    y_position       = max(rho_df$rho, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.02
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('grey90', '#F1E201FF')) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0.5,0.7, 0.9)) +
  labs(x = "", y = expression(Spearman~rho)) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, angle = 45))

fig3b

ggsave("../figs/Rho_Respondersvs_non_LOO.png", height = 3.5, width = 2, bg = "white")

```

```{r}
plot_grid(fig3a, fig3b, labels = 'AUTO', rel_widths = c(1,0.3))

ggsave("../figs/Fig3AB.pdf", width = 6, height = 3)

```


















Permutation importance averaged across LOO folds:

```{r}
# ── Feature importance (averaged across all LOO folds) ───────────────────
mean_imp <- colMeans(imp_matrix)
sd_imp   <- apply(imp_matrix, 2, sd)

imp_df <- data.frame(
  Feature    = names(mean_imp),
  Importance = mean_imp,
  SD         = sd_imp
) %>%
  mutate(Feature = case_when(
    Feature == "average_distance"  ~ "Metabolic\nDistance",
    Feature == "met_independence"  ~ "Metabolic\nIndependence",
    Feature == "log10_pre_abund"   ~ "Pre-FMT\nAbundance",
    Feature == "diversity_ratio"   ~ "Diversity\nRatio",
    Feature == "degree_centrality" ~ "Degree\nCentrality",
    Feature == "growth_rate"       ~ "Growth\nRate",
    TRUE ~ Feature
  )) %>%
  arrange(desc(Importance))

imp_df$Feature <- factor(imp_df$Feature, levels = imp_df$Feature)

p_imp <- ggplot(imp_df, aes(x = Feature, y = Importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = pmax(Importance - SD, 0), ymax = Importance + SD),
                width = 0.2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Permutation Importance\n(mean +/- SD across LOO folds)") +
  theme_cowplot()

print(p_imp)

ggsave("../figs/LOO_permutation_importance.pdf", p_imp, width = 5, height = 3)
ggsave("../figs/LOO_permutation_importance.png", p_imp, width = 5, height = 3, bg = "white")

print(imp_df)

```

Feature dropout analysis (LOO rho with each feature removed):

```{}
# ── For each feature, run full LOO without it, report rho ────────────────
dropout_results <- map_dfr(rf_features, function(drop_feat) {
  feats_subset <- setdiff(rf_features, drop_feat)
  f_subset <- as.formula(paste("log_fold_change ~", paste(feats_subset, collapse = " + ")))
  
  rho_vec <- numeric(n_rec)
  for (i in seq_along(recipients)) {
    rec      <- recipients[i]
    train_df <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient != rec)
    test_df  <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient == rec)
    
    mod <- ranger(
      formula       = f_subset,
      data          = train_df,
      num.trees     = 100,
      mtry          = min(3, length(feats_subset)),
      min.node.size = 2
    )
    
    preds    <- predict(mod, data = test_df)$predictions
    pred_abd <- test_df$pre_abundance * 2^preds
    rho_vec[i] <- cor(test_df$post_abundance, pred_abd,
                      method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  }
  
  tibble(dropped = drop_feat, mean_rho = mean(rho_vec), sd_rho = sd(rho_vec))
})

# Add full model baseline
dropout_results <- bind_rows(
  tibble(dropped   = "none (full model)",
         mean_rho  = mean(loo_rho_abundance),
         sd_rho    = sd(loo_rho_abundance)),
  dropout_results
) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_rho = mean_rho - mean_rho[dropped == "none (full model)"],
    label = case_when(
      dropped == "none (full model)"  ~ "Full Model",
      dropped == "average_distance"   ~ "- Metabolic Distance",
      dropped == "met_independence"   ~ "- Metabolic Independence",
      dropped == "log10_pre_abund"    ~ "- Pre-FMT Abundance",
      dropped == "diversity_ratio"    ~ "- Diversity Ratio",
      dropped == "degree_centrality"  ~ "- Degree Centrality",
      dropped == "growth_rate"        ~ "- Growth Rate",
      TRUE ~ dropped
    )
  )

dropout_results$label <- factor(dropout_results$label,
                                levels = rev(dropout_results$label))

p_dropout <- ggplot(dropout_results, aes(x = label, y = mean_rho)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_rho - sd_rho, ymax = mean_rho + sd_rho),
                width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(loo_rho_abundance), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = expression(LOO~Spearman~rho~(abundance))) +
  theme_cowplot()

print(p_dropout)

ggsave("../figs/LOO_feature_dropout.pdf", p_dropout, width = 5, height = 3)
ggsave("../figs/LOO_feature_dropout.png", p_dropout, width = 5, height = 3, bg = "white")

print(dropout_results %>% select(label, mean_rho, sd_rho, delta_rho))

```

LOO composition PCoA panels:

```{r}
library(ape)
library(vegan)

make_pcoa_loo <- function(rec) {
  sub <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient == rec)
  
  comp <- sub %>%
    select(donor_abundance, pre_abundance, post_abundance, loo_pred_abundance, taxon) %>%
    rename(pred_abundance = loo_pred_abundance) %>%
    left_join(tax %>% select(id, family), by = c("taxon" = "id")) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(donor_abundance, pre_abundance, post_abundance, pred_abundance),
      names_to  = "Sample",
      values_to = "abundance"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Sample, family) %>%
    summarize(abund = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Sample) %>%
    mutate(prop = abund / sum(abund)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  comm <- comp %>%
    select(Sample, family, prop) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = family, values_from = prop, values_fill = 0) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Sample")
  
  dist_mat <- vegdist(comm, method = "bray")
  pcoa_res <- pcoa(dist_mat)
  coords   <- as_tibble(pcoa_res$vectors[, 1:2], rownames = "Sample")
  var_exp  <- round(100 * pcoa_res$values$Relative_eig[1:2], 1)
  
  rho <- cor(sub$post_abundance, sub$loo_pred_abundance,
             method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  
  ggplot(coords, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, color = Sample)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    labs(
      title = sprintf("%s  |  rho = %.2f", rec, rho),
      x     = paste0("PCoA1 (", var_exp[1], "%)"),
      y     = paste0("PCoA2 (", var_exp[2], "%)")
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(n.breaks = 3) +
    theme_cowplot() +
    theme(
      plot.title      = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title      = element_text(size = 6)
    )
}

pcoa_panels <- map(unique(df_rf$recipient), make_pcoa_loo)

legend_plot <- make_pcoa_loo(unique(df_rf$recipient)[1]) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
shared_legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

main_panels <- plot_grid(plotlist = pcoa_panels, ncol = 7)

final_with_legend <- ggdraw(main_panels) +
  draw_plot(shared_legend,
            x = 0.6, y = 0.05,
            width = 0.5, height = 0.35)

print(final_with_legend)

ggsave("../figs/PCoA_leave1out_LOO.png", final_with_legend,
       width = 15, height = 6, bg = "white")

```

LOO composition stacked bar plots:

```{r}

plots <- map(unique(df_rf$recipient), function(rec) {
  test_df <- df_rf %>% filter(recipient == rec)
  
  rho <- cor(test_df$post_abundance, test_df$loo_pred_abundance,
             method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  
  comp <- test_df %>%
    rename(pred_abundance = loo_pred_abundance) %>%
    select(-abundance) %>%
    left_join(tax %>% select(id, family), by = c("taxon" = "id")) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(donor_abundance, pre_abundance, post_abundance, pred_abundance),
      names_to  = "stage",
      values_to = "abundance"
    ) %>%
    group_by(recipient, stage, family) %>%
    summarise(prop = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(recipient, stage) %>%
    mutate(prop = prop / sum(prop)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(stage = factor(stage,
      levels = c("donor_abundance", "pre_abundance", "post_abundance", "pred_abundance"),
      labels = c("Donor", "Pre-FMT", "Post-FMT", "Predicted")
    ))
  
  ggplot(comp, aes(x = stage, y = prop, fill = family)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(
      title = sprintf("%s  |  rho = %.2f", rec, rho),
      x = NULL, y = "Relative abundance"
    ) +
    theme_cowplot() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 9)
    )
})

plot_grid(plotlist = plots, ncol = 7)

ggsave("../figs/PredictComposition_LOO.png", width = 18, height = 8, bg = "white")

```



Engraftment by responder vs non-responder:

```{r}
library(vegan)

# Bray-Curtis: pre vs post per recipient
bc_df <- df_rf %>%
  group_by(recipient, taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    pre  = unique(pre_abundance),
    post = unique(post_abundance),
    clinical_response = unique(clinical_response),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(recipient, clinical_response) %>%
  summarise(
    bc = vegdist(rbind(pre, post), method = "bray")[1],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_bc <- ggplot(bc_df, aes(x = clinical_response, y = bc, fill = clinical_response)) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0, width = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons      = list(c("responder", "non-responder")),
    test             = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    y_position       = max(bc_df$bc) + 0.05
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Bray-Curtis\n(Pre vs Post)") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, angle = 45))

# Shannon change per recipient
alpha_df <- df_rf %>%
  group_by(recipient, clinical_response) %>%
  summarise(
    shannon_pre  = diversity(pre_abundance,  index = "shannon"),
    shannon_post = diversity(post_abundance, index = "shannon"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_shannon = shannon_post - shannon_pre)

p_alpha <- ggplot(alpha_df, aes(x = clinical_response, y = delta_shannon, fill = clinical_response)) +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0, width = 0.1, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons      = list(c("responder", "non-responder")),
    test             = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    y_position       = max(alpha_df$delta_shannon, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.1
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = expression(Delta~"Shannon index")) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, angle = 45))

plot_grid(p_bc, p_alpha, ncol = 2)

ggsave("../figs/EcologicalChanges_RespondersvsNon.png", height = 3.5, width = 4.5, bg = "white")

```

K-fold cross-validation across training fractions:

```{r}
library(rsample)

subset_fracs <- c(.10, .2, .3, .4, .5, .6, .7, .8, .9)
set.seed(123)

rho_kfold <- map_dfr(subset_fracs, function(p) {
  df_sub <- df_rf %>% sample_frac(p)
  folds  <- vfold_cv(df_sub, v = 10, strata = log_fold_change)
  
  map_dfr(seq_along(folds$splits), function(i) {
    split <- folds$splits[[i]]
    tr    <- analysis(split)
    te    <- assessment(split)
    
    mod <- ranger(
      formula       = rf_formula,
      data          = tr,
      num.trees     = 100,
      mtry          = 3,
      min.node.size = 2,
      num.threads   = parallel::detectCores() - 1
    )
    
    pred <- predict(mod, te)$predictions
    rho  <- cor(te$log_fold_change, pred, method = "spearman")
    
    tibble(subset = paste0(p * 100, "%"), fold = i, rho = rho)
  })
})

ggplot(rho_kfold, aes(x = subset, y = rho)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey80") +
  stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, fill = "dodgerblue", outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0, alpha = 0.7, width = 0.2) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Training fraction", y = expression(Spearman~rho))

ggsave("../figs/IBS_heldout_kfold.png", width = 4.5, height = 3, bg = "white")

```
